_provenance: SOURCE-VERIFIED from ory/polis@v26.2.0 (npm/src/controller/oauth.ts + swagger annotations). Live JSON capture of these two responses was attempted via the Mock SAML round-trip but blocked by mocksaml.com's hosted IdP returning HTTP 500 on headless form submission (a Node ERR_INVALID_ARG_TYPE in mocksaml's own server, not a Polis issue). The OAuth /authorize contract itself IS live-verified — see oauth_authorize_redirect.json (real 302 to the IdP with a signed RSA-SHA256 SAMLRequest). The SCIM surface (the primary parser target) is fully live-captured + HMAC-verified — see webhook_deliveries.json.

shape.id_token: <JWT, present only when scope=openid AND OpenID JWT signing keys are configured on Polis>

notes: access_token is opaque (hexKey + '.' + token), NOT a JWT — do not attempt to decode it; call /userinfo with it.
id_token is a JWT; validate alg (pin, reject 'none'), iss, aud, exp, and nonce when present.

roles: optional string[] — present when IdP supplies role attributes
groups: optional string[] — present when IdP supplies group attributes

raw._comment: full IdP attribute map; group/role claims live here for many IdPs

notes: Userinfo uses camelCase (firstName/lastName) — DIFFERENT from SCIM events which use snake_case (first_name/last_name).
requested.tenant MUST be asserted == the connection's polisTenant the callback initiated, as a second cross-tenant guard.
